/cwe/weakness/315.Name: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information in a Cookie
/cwe/weakness/315.Description: The product stores sensitive information in cleartext in a cookie.
/cwe/weakness/315.ExtendedDescription: Attackers can use widely-available tools to view the cookie and read the sensitive information. Even if the information is encoded in a way that is not human-readable, certain techniques could determine which encoding is being used, then decode the information.

ModesOfIntroduction.Note: OMISSION: This weakness is caused by missing a security tactic during the architecture and design phase.

Entries.IntroText: The following code excerpt stores a plaintext user account ID in a browser cookie.

Entries.BodyText: Because the account ID is in plaintext, the user's account information is exposed if their computer is compromised by an attacker.
